prompt: A wide shot of a bustling city intersection on a sunny day, capturing the transition between two distinct architectural styles. On the left, a curved, reddish-brown brick building stands out with its modern design and large windows, while on the right, a sleek, light-colored stone structure with large windows adds to the urban landscape. The street is relatively quiet, with minimal pedestrian activity. A white van is parked on the left side of the street, and traffic lights show green signals. A couple of pedestrians can be seen near the TD Bank branch on the left, while others stroll along the sidewalk on the right. The sky is clear and blue, indicating pleasant weather. As the camera moves forward, it captures the continuation of the street, revealing more of the urban landscape, including additional storefronts and parked cars. The overall scene remains calm and orderly, with the camera's steady progression providing a continuous view of the city's architecture and streetscape.
